ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the query */,
  "table_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the table being queried */,
  "query_contents" TEXT /* The SQL or analytical contents of the query */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance score of the query result */,
  "query_length" INTEGER /* Length of the query in characters */,
  "query_string_length" INTEGER /* Length of the query string in terms of data size */,
  "num_cols" INTEGER /* Number of columns returned by the query */,
  "num_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows returned by the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "query_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query started */,
  "query_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query ended */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data source used for the query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who executed the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" TEXT /* Identifier for each table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table's contents */,
  "num_columns" INTEGER /* Number of columns in the table */,
  "num_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows currently in the table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data source of the table */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the table */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the table is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated query */,
  "first_col_hits" REAL /* Hits on the first column of the query results */,
  "second_col_hits" REAL /* Hits on the second column of the query results */,
  "page_title_idf" REAL /* Inverse Document Frequency (IDF) for the page title */,
  "section_title_idf" REAL /* IDF for the section title */,
  "table_caption_idf" REAL /* IDF for the table caption */,
  "table_heading_idf" REAL /* IDF for the table heading */,
  "table_body_idf" REAL /* IDF for the table body */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits across all columns */,
  "query_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query */,
  "query_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during query execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_queries" (
  "user_query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user query interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the query */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executed query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the query was executed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's query interaction (e.g., started, completed, failed) */,
  "query_result" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT column to store the query result */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the query result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_queries_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated query */,
  "total_executions" INTEGER /* Total number of times the query has been executed */,
  "average_execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time for the query */,
  "max_execution_time" REAL /* Maximum execution time recorded for the query */,
  "min_execution_time" REAL /* Minimum execution time recorded for the query */,
  "total_memory_usage" REAL /* Total memory usage for all executions of the query */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits across all query executions */,
  "last_execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_statistics_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query log entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executed query */,
  "execution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the query was executed */,
  "execution_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution in seconds */,
  "result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the results returned by the query in bytes */,
  "query_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the query execution */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query execution (e.g., success, fail) */,
  "query_result" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT column to store the query result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data source is active */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data sync */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Overall data quality score for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated query */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the data returned */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness score of the data returned */,
  "timeliness" REAL /* Timeliness score of the data returned */,
  "query_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the query execution */,
  "query_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query execution (e.g., success, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "api_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API log entry */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used for the interaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., import, export) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, fail) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who performed the API action */,
  "request_size" INTEGER /* Size of the API request in bytes */,
  "response_size" INTEGER /* Size of the API response in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
